meta.title: Incredible Falcon 9 HQ Sound and 4K Slow Motion video!
meta.description:
SpaceX's Falcon 9 Rocket (B1056) carrying 60 Starlink Satellites taking off from SLC-40 at Cape Canaveral Space Force Station on February 17, 2020.

Shot with:
Z-Cam E2 // Z-Cam E6
Meade LX-200 10" Telescope from OPT Telescopes - https://bit.ly/2T5Puc3
UFO Tracker Software (to control the telescope) By Scott Ferguson (https://www.youtube.com/user/messierhunter)
Audio - Zoom H3-VR
Collaboration with Ryan Chylinski and MaryLiz Bender from Cosmic Perspective (https://www.youtube.com/cosmicperspective)

--------------------------

Thanks to my Moon Walkers for helping produce each and every video! - Aaron Davis, Asad Rehman, Blake Jacobs, David Glover, Jared smith, Joe Leva, John Malkin, Mac Malkawi, Max Haot, Nicholas T. Gallman, NSS North Houston Space Society, Ole Mathias Aarseth Heggem, Scott G Raderstorf, Tomdmay, TTTA

Want to support what I do? Consider becoming a Patreon supporter for access to exclusive livestreams, our discord channel and subreddit! - http://patreon.com/everydayastronaut

Or become a YouTube member for some bonus perks as well! - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6uKrU_WqJ1R2HMTY3LIx5Q/join

The best place for all your space merch needs!
https://everydayastronaut.com/shop/

All music is original! Check out my album "Maximum Aerodynamic Pressure" anywhere you listen to music (Spotify, iTunes, Google Play, Amazon, etc) or click here for easy links - http://everydayastronaut.com/music

I'm the cohost of an awesome podcast where we talk all about current technologies and how they shape our future! http://ourludicrousfuture.com or here on YouTube https://www.youtube.com/ourludicrousfuture
